g.text: Secure Firmware Update & Cloud Data Pipeline

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Multi-Tenant | AWS Cloud | Node.js | Lambda | MySQL | S3

g.text: [1] FIRMWARE: Pod -> Node.js -> API GW -> WAF -> Cognito -> Lambda FW API -> MySQL (verify) -> S3 Firmware (A/B/C) -> Pre-Signed URL -> Pod

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: [2] REPORTS: Pod packages (PDF/JSON/XML/CSV) -> writes directly to SaaS S3 Reports Bucket via presigned PUT -> SaaS Sync -> Fleet Analytics

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: TWO S3 BUCKETS: (1) Firmware — tenant-isolated in AWS (/tenant-x/firmware/) | (2) Reports — inside SaaS platform (pod writes direct via presigned PUT URL)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: MULTI-TENANCY: Operator A / B / C fully isolated at firmware bucket level

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: TECH STACK: Node.js | AWS API Gateway | AWS Lambda | MySQL RDS | Amazon S3 | IAM | Cognito | WAF | SNS
